Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.votereminding

Class VoteRemindersManager

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.votereminding.VoteRemindersManager
public final class VoteRemindersManager extends Object
VoteReminders core manager (no Bukkit repeating tasks). Uses ScheduledExecutorService for: - interval tick (aligned to minute boundary) - flush coalescing - delayed evaluations Assumptions (per your note): - VotingPluginUser lookup + Reward giving are safe off-thread for your implementation.
